understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning all selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied simultaneously, triggering a WIN state and progressing until the final level is completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was turn/step-limited; on each step you could either move the currently selected piece with MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN or use CLICK to select/switch which piece was active (by clicking its coordinates) and/or attempt to move/place it to a target square. Obstacles/walls blocked movement and prevented a piece from changing position when a move/click-target was invalid. Pieces could only move into legal, unblocked cells; if pushing existed, it would require adjacent space and would be prevented by walls/blocked tiles, otherwise moves simply failed when blocked.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning all selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied simultaneously, triggering a WIN state and progressing until the final level is completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was turn/step-limited; on each step you could either move the currently selected piece with MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN or use CLICK to select/switch which piece was active (by clicking its coordinates) and/or attempt to move/place it to a target square. Obstacles/walls blocked movement and prevented a piece from changing position when a move/click-target was invalid. Pieces could only move into legal, unblocked cells; if pushing existed, it would require adjacent space and would be prevented by walls/blocked tiles, otherwise moves simply failed when blocked.
